epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Clinical diagnosis; conservative management is standard

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Moderate to high with physiotherapy access

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Primary care and physiotherapy pathways common
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Exercise-based rehab and ergonomic modifications; injections selectively; surgery rare
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Wait times for physiotherapy in some systems
